list.description: Everyone who has access to this workspace. Invite or create members directly here.
list.emptyDescriptionFiltered: Adjust or clear the filters above.
list.emptyDescription: Click New user to add the first one.

table.name: Name
table.deleteSelf: You can’t delete your own account here

delete.title: Delete this user?
delete.descriptionNamed: This soft-deletes {{email}}. Their sessions and API keys keep working until they expire — revoke those separately if you need an immediate cut-off.

bulk.confirm_one: Delete {{count}} user? This can’t be undone.
bulk.confirm_other: Delete {{count}} users? This can’t be undone.

create.title: New user
create.description: Creates a user under the current tenant with a password credential.
create.displayNameHelp: Optional. Shown in the user list and audit logs.
create.phoneHelp: E.164 format. Used for SMS OTP if MFA is enabled.
create.passwordHelp: At least 8 characters. The user can change it later.

edit.title: Edit user
edit.description: Email is immutable. To change a password use the Set password action.
edit.phoneHelp: E.164 format. Leave blank to clear.
edit.statusSelfHelp: You can’t suspend your own account from this screen.
edit.statusHelp: Suspending prevents sign-in but keeps the account.

setPassword.title: Set new password
setPassword.description: Sets a new password for {{email}}. The user’s existing sessions stay valid until they expire — revoke them from Security › Sessions if you need an immediate sign-out.

sessions.description: Active sign-in sessions tracked under your user. The backend stores IP, User-Agent, and last-seen-at for each.
sessions.title: Sessions

deleted.description: Soft-deleted users. Restore brings an account back; permanent deletion removes it and its sessions for good.
deleted.purgeDescription: This removes the account and its sessions and cannot be undone.

detail.activityEmpty: No recent audit events for this user.
detail.resetMfaConfirmDescription: Their authenticator (TOTP), recovery codes, and email/SMS OTP factors will be removed, and they'll re-enroll at next sign-in.

import.description: Bulk-import users from a CSV or newline-delimited JSON file. Email is required; password / display_name / phone are optional.
import.dropTitle: Drop your CSV or NDJSON file
import.dropHelp: or click anywhere in this box to browse
